creator: olgeni@FreeBSD.org
text:
virtualbox-ose-4.3.22 does not build (on poudriere) when X11 is disabled:

=======================<phase: package        >============================
===>  Building package for virtualbox-ose-4.3.22
/usr/local/lib/libpng16.so.16
/usr/local/lib/libxslt.so.1.1.28
/usr/local/lib/libcurl.so.4.3.0
/usr/local/lib/libdbus-1.so.3.8.9
/usr/local/lib/libvncserver.so.0.0.0
/usr/local/lib/libglib-2.0.so.0.4200.1
/usr/local/lib/libIDL-2.so.0.0.0
/usr/local/etc/rc.d/vboxnet
/usr/local/bin/cdrecord
/usr/local/bin/python2.7
/usr/local/bin/python2.7
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/emulators/virtualbox-ose/work/stage/usr/local/@comment lib/virtualbox/VBoxSDL: No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/emulators/virtualbox-ose/work/stage/usr/local/@comment lib/virtualbox/VirtualBox: No such file or directory
*** Error code 1
